summary: Iteration 353 - Vendor identity scrub PASSED end-to-end on backend + public detail pages. WhatsApp share component is correctly implemented and self-contained, but is NOT wired to the route /partner/affiliate-dashboard mentioned in the request - that route renders AffiliateDashboardHomePage (CampaignCard with copy-only Quick Share) and never imports AffiliateProductPromoTable. Backend pytest 5/5 passed; force-hydrate is idempotent and exposes sanitised_descriptions; 429 products scanned across 2 branches + 44 category_ids with zero leak hits; 3 mobile product detail pages verified clean.

ui_bugs.issue: The new AffiliateProductPromoTable (with the green WhatsApp button data-testid=whatsapp-share-<i>) is NOT rendered at /partner/affiliate-dashboard. That route uses AffiliateDashboardHomePage which renders CampaignCard whose Share button only copies caption to clipboard - no wa.me link, no target=_blank. The component is only imported in /pages/affiliate/AffiliateDashboardPage.jsx and /pages/affiliate/AffiliateDashboardV2.jsx (different routes that are not the live ones). Acceptance criterion in review_request fails on the requested URL.

action_items: Wire AffiliateProductPromoTable into /partner/affiliate-dashboard (AffiliateDashboardHomePage.jsx) so each product/promo row renders the green WhatsApp share button with data-testid='whatsapp-share-<i>', href='https://wa.me/?text=...', and target='_blank'. Component itself is correct - just import + render with the campaigns/products list.
critical_code_review_comments: AffiliateProductPromoTable.jsx is correctly built: data-testid='whatsapp-share-<i>', href starts with https://wa.me/?text=, encodes product_name + promo_code + share link, target='_blank', uses WhatsApp green #25D366. No changes needed in the component itself.

Route mismatch: review_request says /partner/affiliate-dashboard must contain whatsapp-share-<i>; that route is bound to AffiliateDashboardHomePage which never imports AffiliateProductPromoTable. The component currently lives only in /pages/affiliate/* pages.

/api/products/categories/list returns category names as strings (no UUIDs) - if other callers expect taxonomy IDs they will break. Backend search endpoint accepts category_id as a UUID but the public list endpoint does not expose UUIDs.

success_rate.frontend: 67% (vendor scrub on detail page: 3/3 clean PASS; WhatsApp button on /partner/affiliate-dashboard: NOT RENDERED at requested route)

test_credentials.approved_affiliate: NONE FOUND - /api/admin/affiliates returned only pending records (e.g. mgeorge@datavision.co.tz status=pending). qualifier.test@example.com login returns 401 invalid credentials. Cannot perform live in-page affiliate dashboard test - verified via component file + route mapping inspection instead.

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend scrub verified across 429 distinct product cards via /api/marketplace/products/search (group_slug=Promotional Materials, group_slug=Office Equipment, plus 10 category_id UUIDs) - zero hits for 'darcity', 'dar city', 'sourced from'. Force-hydrate at POST /api/admin/force-hydrate returns body.sanitised_descriptions = {scanned: 610, cleaned: 0 on second run} - idempotent. Mobile (420x900) detail page tested via clicking Add to Cart/Select Options on 3 products from /marketplace: 2026 Diary - Black, 2cm LANYARD COTTON Safety Clip Black, 2cm LANYARD SOFT SUBLIMATION Black - all clean in body innerText. Component AffiliateProductPromoTable.jsx (lines 73-83) has correct data-testid, wa.me href, target=_blank, green #25D366 - just needs to be wired into AffiliateDashboardHomePage.jsx for /partner/affiliate-dashboard.
rca_of_the_issue: ROOT CAUSE: /partner/affiliate-dashboard route is bound in App.js to AffiliateDashboardHomePage component, but the developer added the WhatsApp share button only in AffiliateProductPromoTable which is imported in /pages/affiliate/AffiliateDashboardPage.jsx and AffiliateDashboardV2.jsx (legacy / unused route components). Reproduction: visit /partner/affiliate-dashboard and inspect DOM - no [data-testid^='whatsapp-share-'] element. Mitigation: in AffiliateDashboardHomePage.jsx, import AffiliateProductPromoTable and render <AffiliateProductPromoTable rows={campaigns} baseUrl={window.location.origin} /> in place of (or alongside) the campaign grid, mapping campaign data to the row shape ({product_name, final_price, affiliate_amount, discount_amount, promo_code, share_link}).
